headline: Man's 'Business Casual' Email Signature Includes His Star Sign, Enneagram, And Coffee Order
summary: The signature is 47 lines long. Clients have started a support group.
fullBody: Jake McSignature's email footer includes: 'Jake (he/him), Scorpio rising, Enneagram 7, latte with oat milk, ask me about my podcast.' Clients have asked to be removed from his mailing list. 'I just wanted a quote,' one said. Jake has now added his 'love language' and 'current manifestation.' HR has asked him to 'maybe stop.' Jake is 'processing their feedback.' The signature grows.
